arts.ttl: Jimmy Thelin makes Aberdeen DNA promise as clear transfer pattern emerges at Pittodrie
arts.sum: The Swede has brought in eight Aberdeen signings to date - and only ONE has been Scottish

arts.ttl: Aberdeen v Hearts, Igamane & Valakari in focus
arts.sum: Rangers' Hamza Igamane, St Johnstone manager Simo Valakari and Aberdeen versus Hearts are in focus in Sunday's Scottish Premiership games.

arts.ttl: I spent 14 days in a coma fighting for my life and now Hearts punters are in line for something special
arts.sum: Jambos new boy Elton Kabangu spent two weeks in a coma after contracting Covid-19 in July 2020

arts.ttl: Alexander Jensen to Aberdeen is ON as Jimmy Thelin lands his main man after bumper fee triggers deal
arts.sum: Jensen can play either full-back position or in midfield and has been one of Thelin’s top targets

arts.ttl: Is Aberdeen vs Hearts on TV? Live stream, ref, VAR and team news
arts.sum: Jimmy Thelin's side will be desperate to arrest their ongoing freefall against the Jambos

arts.ttl: Striker Boyce leaves Hearts to join Derry City
arts.sum: Northern Ireland international Liam Boyce joins League of Ireland side Derry City from Hearts on a two-year deal.

arts.ttl: Jimmy Thelin reveals why Aberdeen struggles aren't stressing him out as boss attacks turnaround with '100% conviction'
arts.sum: Thelin isn't sweating the small stuff, or the big stuff, at Pittodrie

arts.ttl: Jamie McCart reveals Hearts move was sold to him MONTHS ago as he eyes St Johnstone silverware repeat
arts.sum: Tynecastle new boy is hoping to add to the two winners gongs he picked up with Saints after returning north of the border.

arts.ttl: How Sir Alex Ferguson inspired Kristers Tobers move to Aberdeen and why new signing's dad is DESPERATE to visit
arts.sum: Tobers says his dad can't wait to visit and get his photo taken beside the iconic statue

arts.ttl: 'Leaks unacceptable' - Critchley angry over Hearts speculation
arts.sum: Neil Critchley says "certain information that has been leaked is unacceptable" amid speculation about Cammy Devlin leaving Hearts.
